baseline.reason: Falsely claims integer underflow at line 419 as the root cause. Line 419 is in the first branch (guarded by '> s->nb_samples') and cannot underflow. The real bug is in the else-if at line 430 which doesn't validate inputs[0]. The baseline's description of the crossfade path lacking input[0] validation is partially correct but undermined by the wrong underflow theory.

vastdb.reason: Accurately identifies the root cause: the else-if at line 430 only checks inputs[1], not inputs[0]. Correctly traces the trigger path through first condition false, else-if entry with missing input[0] check, consume_samples on inputs[0] returning insufficient data, and crossfade_samples using s->nb_samples as loop bound despite undersized cf[0]. No unsupported speculation.
